name: Party Mix Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Pile everything into the machine in the order listed.
2. Select the bread cycle.
3. Remove at the end of the cooling cycle.
4. The flavors of the seasonings are most pronounced when the bread is allowed to cool completely.
Variations:
HIGH-SPEED PARTY MIX WHEAT BREAD (Hitachi and Regal machines)
Use 2 teaspoons active dry yeast and select the "BREAD RAPID" setting.
PARTY MIX WHITE BREAD
Substitute sugar for the molasses and bread flour for the whole wheat flour. If you object to the strange tint that the Worcestershire sauce will give the dough, use Lea & Perrin's White Wine Worcestershire sauce. Hitachi and Regal owners who want to use the "BREAD RAPID" cycle can use 2 teaspoons of active dry yeast.
